introSection: Blazin' Buckaroo is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster was built for Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure (at the time called VisionLand). It opened with the park on May 23, 1998 and was called Marvel Mania. It sat standing but not operating with the park during 2002 and closed with the park in 2011.

After standing but not operating for a year, it was dismantled and sold to Elitch Gardens. It was erected on the spot previously occupied by Cactus Coaster and opened on May 4, 2013.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Blazin' Buckaroo is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA.

The roller coaster was built for Alabama Adventure and Splash Adventure (at the time called VisionLand). It opened with the park on May 23, 1998 and was called Marvel Mania. It sat standing but not operating with the park during 2002 and closed with the park in 2011.

After standing but not operating for a year, it was dismantled and sold to Elitch Gardens. It was erected on the spot previously occupied by Cactus Coaster and opened on May 4, 2013.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.
